name: Newswiki
goal: Build a private local Newswiki instance from this public-safe template.
audience: AI agents acting with a user's local approval
confirmation_required: creating or overwriting a private instance directory
editing an external agent MCP config

commands.service_tests: python -m unittest tests.test_public_export_schema service.tests.test_health service.tests.test_search service.tests.test_context_pack service.tests.test_routes service.tests.test_mcp_contract

mcp_servers.name: newswiki-wiki
mcp_servers.purpose: Query and write back private Markdown wiki memory.

mcp_servers.name: newswiki-capabilities
mcp_servers.purpose: Recommend local skills, MCPs, CLIs, and capability chains.

mcp_servers.name: newswiki-newsfeed
mcp_servers.purpose: Expose recent public-safe news examples or private news exports.

mcp_servers.name: newswiki-hosted-alpha
mcp_servers.purpose: Test the hosted alpha context-pack MCP tools with fake public-safe data.

success_criteria: hosted MCP smoke test returns ok true
MCP config snippets are available for the user's agent client
